name: WireGuard
description: Fast, modern WireGuard VPN with a web UI for managing peers (wg-easy). Sign in with username 'admin' and the password you configure here. Your other greffons stay isolated from VPN peers, but like any full-tunnel VPN a peer can also reach the host running this VPN and its local network. wg-easy's AllowedIPs only sets the peer's own client-side routing (it is not enforced by the server), so only give a peer config to someone you trust with access to that network.

ports.name: wg-easy_51820
ports.review_note: WireGuard sends no response before a valid Noise handshake, so it cannot be used for UDP reflection/amplification. Non-amplifiable. Reviewed 2026-06.

value.title: Admin password
value.description: Password for the wg-easy web UI (username: admin). At least 12 characters: wg-easy rejects a shorter one at login, which would lock you out. Applied on first start only; change it later from the UI itself.
